jd_text: Act as Technical Authority with corporate accountability for technical delivery across Marine and Utility Systems disciplines. Support Director - EPC Engineering (Hull & Marine) on strategy stewardship on capability development, sustainment and industry engagements. Day-to-day operations: Manage technical stewardship and due-diligence of project deliverables for Marine and Utility systems disciplines and interface with counterparts across Floater and Topside Facilities disciplines. Provide support to EPC functional and business leadership on market developments, competitor assessment, corporate business strategy developments. Support leadership team on career path development and sustainment for discipline members on functional and project delivery roles. Ownership on specific Management of Change procedures for respective disciplines on large capital projects. Steward quality assurance and Management of Change procedures on Marine and Utility systems disciplines. Technical competencies: Extensive experience and solid technical knowledge in both conceptual and detailed design of marine systems on floating units (FSO, FPSO, drilling units, semi-submersibles) for the oil and gas industry; Preferred experience in engineering, design, and/or operation of FSRUs and LNG vessels; Pereparing marine systems documentation: Material Take offs, equipment datasheets, Smart PFDs / P&IDs, machinery arrangement and layouts for various offshore units, technical specifications; Performing calculations: heat and mass balance, pressure drop, offloading simulations for production and storage units; Strong technical background in piping, HVAC, hydraulics, equipment, and marine systems integration; Preferred professional experience in shipyards across commissioning and completion phases of shipbuilding / offshore construction projects, vessel operations, and collaboration with marine equipment suppliers; Good understanding of industry best practices and norms for marine standards, safety regulations. Experience in organising discipline readiness for HAZID, HAZOP, SIF, LOPA, SIL reports, etc. CAE Skills : Working experience with Microsoft platforms such as SharePoint, OneDrive and Office suite. Hands-on experience with 2D drafting tools such as AutoCAD or similar, 3D modelling environment such as AVEVA E3D or similar, NURBS modelling tools such as Rhinoceros 3D or similar. Experience in using design and review tools (e.g.,Navisworks), flow simulation software (e.g.,Pipenet, Flowmaster). Preferable to have experience with developing workflow automation tools using Excel VBA Macros / Python or equivalent scripting frameworks. Education: Bachelor’s Degree in Ocean / Offshore Engineering (or) Naval Architecture (or) Marine Technology (Marine Systems) Bachelor’s Degree in Ocean / Offshore Engineering (or) Naval Architecture (or) Marine Technology (Marine Systems) Experience: Minimum cumulative experience 10+ years of experience as Principal Engineer in two or more of the following industry players: (1) Tier – I EPCIC Turnkey Services and Contractor Organisations as Principal and Subject Matter Expert roles. (2) Specialists’ offshore floater / subsea engineering service providers with track record on floater / mooring system concept definition to construction follow up / handover phase ownership. (3) Offshore Production Units Lease-Own-Operate organisations. Functional membership in industrial networks such as OMAE / ISOPE / OTC / SPE committees and organizations. Strong network with OEMs and engineering service industry.
